hero.title: Cost & Savings Calculator
hero.subtitle: Estimate what your building spends — and what it could save by going efficient.

results.title: Results
results.empty: Enter your building's area to see the numbers

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Ranked by impact on your bill

led.title: LED lighting upgrade
led.description: Replacing fluorescent lights with LEDs cuts electricity use by 30–50%.

smartMeters.title: Smart water meters
smartMeters.description: Individual metering reduces water use by 15–20% through awareness alone.

hvac.title: HVAC scheduling
hvac.description: Off-hours heating/cooling schedules save 20–30% of energy costs.

insulation.title: Wall & roof insulation
insulation.description: Proper insulation in Almaty's climate reduces heating load by 25–40%.

solar.title: Rooftop solar (PV)
solar.description: Even partial rooftop solar in sunny Almaty offsets 10–25% of grid draw.
